name: discover
description: Curated RSS discovery. No algorithm. No ads.
author: brine

scripts.test:e2e: start-server-and-test "npx wrangler dev --env dev" http://localhost:8787 "node --test --test-concurrency=4 --test-reporter spec test/e2e/*.test.js"
scripts.test:debug: HEADLESS=0 SLOWMO=100 start-server-and-test "npx wrangler dev --env dev" http://localhost:8787 "node --test --test-reporter spec test/e2e/*.test.js"
